sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67987" key="misqapodosi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μισθαπο-δοσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n67987.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">payment of wages, recompense,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ep.Hebr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.2</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.35</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
